goal: Predict bulk_modulus, density, tg for PEST (*C(C)C(=O)O*)
assumptions: polymer_rules.json defaults are validated for this class (confidence-gated)

evidence.claim: RadonPy/GAFF2_mod path replaced by EMC/PCFF (build-tested: PLA PASS, PET PASS). PCFF has explicit ester types (c_1, o_2, oe). Klajmon2023 benchmarks PLA/PEG with AA-MD.

findings: gate: PEST confidence=high in polymer_rules.json -> expected plan_mode=deterministic; plan declares plan_mode=reasoned. This is the SAFE direction of mismatch (reasoned-on-high adds review, cannot bypass the step-2 fast-path which only fires for deterministic) -> NOT a gate bypass, no escalate. Defaults D-01..D-04 transcribed verbatim by make_deterministic_plan.py; not re-litigated. NOTE: for audit consistency the plan_mode field should be set to deterministic, but the substance passes so this is not a blocker.

mechanical-track swap APPROVED. born stage removed pipeline-wide 2026-06-21 (PCFF+PPPM virial incompatibility, 3/3 fail PMMA4/PVC1/PEEK1 per BORN_MATRIX.md; gen_prompt.py --stage born hard-errors). Replaced with sanctioned glassy Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K (MURNAGHAN.md Rule A/B): is_glassy=TRUE confirmed by T_workflow_K=620 AND direct MD Tg 365 K > 300 K at 640 K/ns. Symmetric bm_pressures_atm=[-1000,-500,0,500,1000]; deform retained as documented fallback.

murnaghan success_criteria match MURNAGHAN.md Rule B1 exactly: fit_converged, eos_r_squared_min=0.999, B0_prime_range=[4,20], volume_equilibrated_all_points. analyze-bm gate [3.0,5.0] GPa vs polymer_rules PEST exp_K_GPa [3.0,4.5] -> plausible glassy-PLA range, no finding. Stage schema OK: murnaghan/deform/analyze-bm all map to track=mechanical per track_map.

ORCHESTRATOR ROUTING (load-bearing, action required): the murnaghan stage does NOT pin a data_path in the plan; cell + pressure selection is runtime via is_glassy. VERIFIED gen_prompt.py:murnaghan_prompt (line 641) defaults is_glassy=False, and line 645 then hard-defaults equil_data to npt_production_out.data (the 620 K MELT cell). temp_K is pinned 300 K (line 655). If the orchestrator omits is_glassy=true, the worker would compress the over-expanded melt cell at 300 K -> WRONG K. The orchestrator MUST pass --is_glassy true AND --data_path <npt_prod300_out.data> to the murnaghan worker. Also note the symmetric +-1000 atm range only fires in MURNAGHAN.md's is_glassy=True branch (PEST class bm_pressures_atm is null), so is_glassy=true is load-bearing for BOTH cell and pressure selection. This is an orchestrator instruction, not a plan defect -> rides as a finding, not a blocker.
D-08 hardware: no engine/gpu_per_run/mpi_ranks pin in decided_params and no D-08_hardware decision -> hardware is policy-derived by gen_prompt.py (safe). No finding.

provenance.revision_note: born->murnaghan mechanical-track swap (born stage retired pipeline-wide 2026-06-21)
